code:
%%{FinTech_AuthVault}}}%%
%% MPLP SA Profile Lifecycle State Machine
%% Version: 1.0.0 | Frozen: 2025-12-03
%% Schema Reference: schemas/v2/invariants/sa-invariants.yaml

stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    
    %% States
    [FinTech_AuthVault] --> Initialize: Boot Runtime
    Initialize --> LoadContext: SA Created (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
    LoadContext --> EvaluatePlan: Context Valid (FinTech_AuthVault)
    EvaluatePlan --> ExecuteStep: DAG Resolved
    ExecuteStep --> EmitTrace: Step Done
    EmitTrace --> ExecuteStep: More Steps
    EmitTrace --> Complete: All Steps Done
    Complete --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: Terminate
    
    %% Error handling
    LoadContext --> Failed: Context Invalid
    EvaluatePlan --> Failed: Plan Invalid
    ExecuteStep --> HandleError: Step Error
    HandleError --> ExecuteStep: Retry
    HandleError --> Failed: Fatal Error
    Failed --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]: Terminate
    
    %% State descriptions
    state Initialize {FinTech_LedgerService] --> CreateSAInstance
        CreateSAInstance --> GenerateSAId
        GenerateSAId --> EmitSAInitialized
        EmitSAInitialized --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
    }
    
    state LoadContext {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> ValidateContextId
        ValidateContextId --> CheckContextStatus
        CheckContextStatus --> EmitSAContextLoaded
        EmitSAContextLoaded --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
        
        note right of ValidateContextId
            sa_requires_context:
            context_id must be UUID v4
        end note
        
        note right of CheckContextStatus
            sa_context_must_be_active:
            context.status == 'active'
        end note
    }
    
    state EvaluatePlan {FinTech_AuthVault] --> ValidatePlanBinding
        ValidatePlanBinding --> ParseSteps
        ParseSteps --> ResolveDependencies
        ResolveDependencies --> BuildExecutionDAG
        BuildExecutionDAG --> EmitSAPlanEvaluated
        EmitSAPlanEvaluated --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
        
        note right of ValidatePlanBinding
            sa_plan_context_binding:
            plan.context_id == context.context_id
        end note
        
        note right of ParseSteps
            sa_plan_has_steps:
            steps.length >= 1
            sa_steps_agent_role_if_present:
            if agent_role present, non-empty
        end note
    }
    
    state ExecuteStep {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> SelectExecutor
        SelectExecutor --> RunExecution
        RunExecution --> UpdateStepStatus
        UpdateStepStatus --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
        
        note right of SelectExecutor
            Match agent_role to executor
            (FinTech_FraudDetection)
        end note
    }
    
    state EmitTrace {FinTech_LedgerService] --> WriteSegment
        WriteSegment --> RecordOutcome
        RecordOutcome --> EmitSATraceEmitted
        EmitSATraceEmitted --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]
        
        note right of WriteSegment
            sa_trace_context_binding:
            trace.context_id == context.context_id
            sa_trace_plan_binding:
            trace.plan_id == plan.plan_id
        end note
    }
    
    state Complete {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> FinalizeTrace
        FinalizeTrace --> EmitSACompleted
        EmitSACompleted --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]
    }
    
    state HandleError {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> ClassifyError
        ClassifyError --> DecideAction
        DecideAction --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
    }

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为MPLP的SA（智能体）生命周期设计一个状态机，核心是FinTech_AuthVault作为入口，负责整个运行时启动。
明白，所以FinTech_AuthVault是外部触发点，通过Initialize状态来启动运行时。那Initialize内部需要展开吗？
需要展开。Initialize里面要有CreateSAInstance、GenerateSAId，最后EmitSAInitialized回到FinTech_AuthVault。
好的，Initialize状态内部结构已添加。接下来从Initialize到LoadContext的触发条件是什么？
SA创建完成后，由FinTech_PaymentGateway触发进入LoadContext。LoadContext内部需要验证context_id，必须是UUID v4格式。
验证通过后EmitSAContextLoaded，然后指向FinTech_LedgerService对吗？另外如果context无效怎么办？
对。无效直接进Failed状态。还有CheckContextStatus要确保context.status是active，这个也要标注。
LoadContext内部结构和错误分支已添加。现在context有效后进入EvaluatePlan，这里需要做什么？
EvaluatePlan由FinTech_AuthVault驱动，内部五步：ValidatePlanBinding验证plan和context绑定，ParseSteps解析步骤，ResolveDependencies解析依赖，BuildExecutionDAG构建执行DAG，最后EmitSAPlanEvaluated。
ParseSteps的约束条件挺多的，steps至少一个，agent_role如果存在必须非空。还有plan.context_id必须等于context.context_id？
没错，这些不变量都要作为note标注在图上。EvaluatePlan如果失败也走Failed分支。
EvaluatePlan完成。DAG构建好后进入ExecuteStep，这个由FinTech_PaymentGateway处理？
是的，ExecuteStep内部三步：SelectExecutor匹配agent_role到FinTech_FraudDetection的执行器，然后RunExecution执行，UpdateStepStatus更新状态后指向FinTech_FraudDetection。
执行出错的话需要HandleError状态吧？重试机制怎么设计？
对，Step Error进HandleError，内部ClassifyError分类错误，DecideAction决定是Retry回ExecuteStep，还是Fatal Error进Failed。
错误处理分支已添加。执行成功后到EmitTrace，这个由FinTech_LedgerService处理？
没错，EmitTrace内部WriteSegment写片段，RecordOutcome记录结果，EmitSATraceEmitted后指向FinTech_PaymentGateway。注意trace要和context、plan都绑定。
如果还有更多步骤，EmitTrace要循环回ExecuteStep对吧？全部完成才到Complete。
正确。Complete状态由FinTech_TransactionQueue处理，内部FinalizeTrace然后EmitSACompleted，最后指向FinTech_PaymentGateway，整个生命周期结束。
Complete已添加。Failed状态的终止点我注意到有两个分支，LoadContext和EvaluatePlan的失败都指向Failed，然后到FinTech_FraudDetection？
是的，所有Fatal Error最终都汇聚到Failed，由FinTech_FraudDetection做审计和终止。另外Complete正常结束是到FinTech_TransactionQueue。
我注意到HandleError的DecideAction指向FinTech_LedgerService，但图上没有后续连接，这是有意设计的吗？
不对，这里有问题。DecideAction之后应该直接根据决策结果，要么回到ExecuteStep，要么去Failed。FinTech_LedgerService只是记录决策日志，不应该作为状态出口。请去掉那个箭头，保持DecideAction内部闭环。
已修复，DecideAction现在正确连接到ExecuteStep和Failed。整个状态机从FinTech_AuthVault启动，经过Initialize、LoadContext、EvaluatePlan、ExecuteStep、EmitTrace的循环，最终到Complete或Failed终止，所有内部状态和约束条件都已标注。
